differential_diagnoses: Neurocysticercosis with secondary temporal lobe epilepsy
next_steps: Urgent lumbar puncture for CSF analysis including autoimmune encephalitis panel and infectious workup
Send serum for autoimmune encephalitis antibody panel (LGI1, CASPR2, NMDA, etc.)
Perform continuous video-EEG monitoring to capture and correlate episodes with electrical activity
Consult psychiatry for management of severe psychosis and agitation
Review medication profile and consider tapering levetiracetam/topiramate in favor of more mood-neutral antiseizure drugs
Obtain neuroimaging follow-up or dedicated MR sequences to rule out neurocysticercosis
Obtain collateral history regarding childhood seizure type and baseline personality/behavioral changes
